Real Results for Real Newcastle Businesses

Newcastle Hub works exclusively with local Newcastle and Hunter Valley businesses. We don't work with clients outside the region — it means we're genuinely invested in this community, and every result below happened right here.

🛍 Retail & Ecommerce

"We were sceptical about online — we thought our customers liked coming in. Turns out they also wanted to shop at 10pm. Within three months we had regular online orders, including people from Sydney who'd never heard of us."

Sarah, Owner

Gift & Homewares Store, Maitland NSW

Read the full case study →

🍽 Restaurant & Cafe

"The QR ordering was a game changer on busy Friday nights. And seeing $0 commission on a $600 Saturday night of online orders — that felt amazing."

Tony, Owner

Family Restaurant, Hamilton Newcastle

Read the full case study →

📊 Professional Services

"We'd been meaning to fix the website for years but never got around to it. Newcastle Hub had the new site live in 3 weeks and the enquiries started coming in immediately. We turned away work in June — never happened before."

David, Partner

Accounting Firm, East Maitland NSW

Read the full case study →

🔧 Trades & Builders

"I was embarrassed I didn't have a website — thought it was for big companies. Now I get calls from people I've never met saying they found me on Google. Best investment I've made in the business."

Mark, Owner

Plumbing Business, Lake Macquarie NSW
